headline: Samsung 85" M80H Mini LED (2026) — members save $180 (11% off), SKU 6671597. Biggest single member discount confirmed in the store today and the easiest big-ticket membership close.
objection: If they hesitate on membership: “Plus is $49.99 for the year — on this 85-inch alone you save $180 today, so the membership pays for itself before it even leaves the store.”

departments.name: TV & Home Theater
departments.notDeals: TCL 65" QM6K ($999.99) and LG 32" LR65 ($179.99) are regular sales open to everyone, NOT member-exclusive. Hisense 65" U6 shows a deal countdown (~15 hrs) and may rotate out by midday.
